zh.lifeSummary: 當Johann Wilhelm Kell於1708年2月26日出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 維德雷斯多福時，他的父親Georg Wilhelm Kell26歲，母親Amelia Christina Fritz33歲。他於1736年1月12日與Maria Magdalena Runkel在海因里希_海普洛文次維德雷斯多福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他去世於1786年5月在美國北卡羅來納州加斯東卡塔巴享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johann Wilhelm Kell于1708年2月26日出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 維德雷斯多福时，他的父亲Georg Wilhelm Kell26岁，母亲Amelia Christina Fritz33岁。他于1736年1月12日与Maria Magdalena Runkel在海因里希_海普洛文次維德雷斯多福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他去世于1786年5月在美国北卡罗来纳州加斯東卡塔巴享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from Middle High German and Middle Low German kelle ‘trowel’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a maker or user of such tools.
German: habitational name from any of the places, especially in Rhineland, named Kell, from Middle Low German kel (a field name denoting swampy land), or from kelle ‘steep path, ravine’ (see Kelle ).

English (northern): from the Old Norse personal name Kel, Kæl, shortened from Áskell (from Ásketill), Ulkel (from Ulfkil), or similar, rather than from the single-element name Ketill (see Kettle ) or its descendants, the shortening of which in Scandinavia occurs later.

variants.name: Kellman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Ari, Chaya, Meyer, Yaakov.
Americanized form of German Kellmann: elaborated variant of Kell 2, with the addition of -mann ‘man’. Compare Kelman .

variants.name: Kells
meanings: Scottish and Irish: from a personal name based on Old Norse ketill ‘sacrificial cauldron, helmet’, with post-medieval excrescent English -s. In Scotland, it may also be of topographic origin, from a place called as ‘the cauldron’.
English: variant of Kell , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Kelle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Bernhard, Klaus.
German: topographic name from the dialect word Kelle ‘steep path, ravine’.

variants.name: Kellenberger
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from a place called Kellenberg in Rhineland (see   Kell   2) or Lower Saxony.

variants.name: Kellen
meanings: German: habitational name from a place so named in Rhineland (see   Kell   2).

nameMeanings.name: Johann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Wilhelm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from wil ‘will’ + helm ‘helmet’; an ancient royal name. See also William .

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

en.lifeSummary: When Johann Wilhelm Kell was born on 26 February 1708, in Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, his father, Georg Wilhelm Kell, was 26 and his mother, Amelia Christina Fritz, was 33. He married Maria Magdalena Runkel on 12 January 1736, in Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rhineland, Prussia. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 9 daughters. He died in May 1786, in Catawba, Gaston, North Carolina, United States, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johann Wilhelm Kell est né le 26 février 1708, à Rengsdorf, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Georg Wilhelm Kell, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Amelia Christina Fritz, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Maria Magdalena Runkel le 12 janvier 1736, à Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rhénanie, Prusse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 9 filles. Il est décédé en mai 1786, à Catawba, Gaston, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johann Wilhelm Kell am 26. Februar 1708 in Rengsdorf, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Georg Wilhelm Kell 26 und seine Mutter Amelia Christina Fritz 33. Er hat am 12. Januar 1736 in Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen Maria Magdalena Runkel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 9 Töchter. it.lifeSummary: Quando Johann Wilhelm Kell è nato il il 26 febbraio 1708 nel Rengsdorf, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, il suo padre, Georg Wilhelm Kell, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Amelia Christina Fritz, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Maria Magdalena Runkel il 12 gennaio 1736, nel Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 9 figlie. Morì nel maggio 1786, nel Catawba, Gaston, Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Johann Wilhelm Kellが1708年2月26日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス ネウウィエドレングスドルフで生まれた時，父Georg Wilhelm Kellは26歳，母Amelia Christina Fritzは33歳であった。1736年1月12日にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズネウウィエドレングスドルフでMaria Magdalena Runkelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1786年5月にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州ガストンカタウバで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johann Wilhelm Kell(이)가 1708년 2월 26일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 니우위드 렌그즈도르프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Georg Wilhelm Kell(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Amelia Christina Fritz(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1736년 1월 12일 플레우ss 리인플로빈츠 니우위드 렌그즈도르프에서 Maria Magdalena Runkel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1786년 5월 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 개스턴 카타w바에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johann Wilhelm Kell nasceu em 26 de fevereiro de 1708, em Rengsdorf, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Georg Wilhelm Kell, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Amelia Christina Fritz, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Maria Magdalena Runkel em 12 de janeiro de 1736, em Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele faleceu em maio de 1786, em Catawba, Gaston, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johann Wilhelm Kell родился 26 февраля 1708 г. в местности ренгсдорф, ландкрис неувиед, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, его отцу по имени Georg Wilhelm Kell было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Amelia Christina Fritz, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria Magdalena Runkel 12 января 1736 г. в местности ренгсдорф, неувиед, раинпровинз, Пруссия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 9 дочерей. Он умер май 1786 г. в местности катавба, гастон, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 78 лет.

es.Ulster, Ulster, New York, United States: Ulster, Ulster, Nueva York, Estados Unidos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johann Wilhelm Kell nació el 26 de febrero de 1708, en Rengsdorf, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, su papá, Georg Wilhelm Kell, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Amelia Christina Fritz, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Maria Magdalena Runkel el 12 de enero de 1736, en Rengsdorf, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió en mayo de 1786, en Catawba, Gaston, Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 78 años.
